content.speakerText: How long does approval usually take?

options.text: It takes about 3–5 business days after submission.
It’s processed immediately once you submit it.
You need to wait for a full month before it’s approved.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确反映了审批的典型周期（3–5个工作日），符合职场实际流程。干扰项1错误地暗示审批是即时的，不符合现实；干扰项2夸大了等待时间；干扰项3错误地限定了审批只在周一发生，无依据。

content.speakerText: When will the money hit my account?

options.text: Within 2 days after approval—payroll runs every Friday.
It will be deposited as soon as the approval is confirmed.
You’ll get it next Monday regardless of when it’s approved.
The bank processes reimbursements every day, so it’s immediate.

content.explanation: 正确答案结合了审批后的时间和发薪周期，是清晰且专业的回应。干扰项1虽然语法正确，但忽略了公司发薪周期的限制，过于理想化；干扰项2错误地假设银行会即时处理；干扰项3错误地固定了到账时间，与实际流程不符。

content.speakerText: I submitted my expense report last Tuesday. When should I expect approval?
content.speakerTextCn: 我上周二提交了报销单，我什么时候能等到审批？

options.text: You should hear back by Friday, since it’s usually 3–5 business days.
It’s already late, so it won’t be approved this month.
You need to resubmit it because Tuesday is a bad day to file.
Approval only happens if you email your manager directly.

content.explanation: 正确答案合理推算提交后3–5个工作日，符合职场常规。干扰项1制造恐慌，无依据；干扰项2错误地认为提交日影响审批，且暗示流程有歧视；干扰项3错误地将流程与是否发邮件挂钩，混淆了标准流程。

content.template: Approval usually takes ___ business days after submission.
content.hint: 这是审批周期的标准范围，用于管理预期
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（审批周期表达）

content.template: The money will be deposited ___ days after approval.
content.hint: 结合发薪周期，这是常见的到账时间表达
content.knowledgePoint: 核心句型（时间范围表达）

content.template: If your manager is on vacation, the approval might take ___.
content.hint: 表示时间延长的常用表达

content.speakerText: How long does approval usually take?
expectedAnswers: About 3 to 5 business days after you submit it.
Typically, it takes around a week, but if your manager is away, it could be longer.
It usually takes a few days—most approvals are done within 5 working days.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了审批周期范围
语言准确性：语法和时态是否正确，是否使用了专业表达如 'business days'
表达自然度：是否符合职场口语习惯，避免生硬或过度正式
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'approval', 'submit', 'business days', 'longer' 等核心词

content.speakerText: When will the money hit my account?
expectedAnswers: Within two days after approval, since payroll is processed every Friday.
It usually takes a few days—depending on the bank, but always by the next pay cycle.
You’ll see it in your account right after the payroll runs, which is every Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否结合发薪周期解释到账时间
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'within', 'payroll', 'cycle' 等术语
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，有合理变体
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'approval', 'payroll', 'next cycle', 'bank' 等关键表达

content.speakerText: I submitted my reimbursement last week. Has it been approved yet?
content.speakerTextCn: 我上周提交了报销，审批通过了吗？
expectedAnswers: It’s probably still in process—approval usually takes 3–5 days, so check back early next week.
If it’s been more than a week, you might want to follow up with your manager, especially if they’re traveling.
It should be approved by now unless there’s an issue—have you confirmed your receipts are complete?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否合理回应查询，提供信息或建议下一步
语言准确性：是否使用恰当的时态和职场表达（如 'in process', 'follow up', 'receipts'）
表达自然度：是否语气礼貌、符合职场沟通习惯
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'submitted', 'approval', 'process', 'manager', 'receipts' 等场景关键词
